s: Control your phone's camera remotely from your Pebble smartwatch
d:
Remote shooting from your Pebble watch. See a live preview of your phone's camera and trigger the shutter from your wrist without touching your phone. Perfect for group photos, selfies, and stable shots!

Take photos and videos with complete camera control from the phone - adjust exposure, ISO, white balance, focus modes, and more.

Re-released to support the last Pebble smartwatches and added support for camera preview, Supports newer Pebble 2 Duo and Pebble Time 2

Features:
- Pebble smartwatch remote shutter and camera preview
- Full manual controls from the phone (ISO, exposure, white balance, focus)
- Grid overlays and level indicators
- And many other camera features and customizations

Forked from Open Camera with added Pebble functionality.
